'''shazhocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yoctoampere|yoctoampere]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-zh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yoctoampere|yoctoampere]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shazhocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæzhecheth|shæzhecheth]] || [[word:shæzhechej|shæzhechej]] || [[word:shæzhechesh|shæzhechesh]] || [[word:shæzheche|shæzheche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shazhozhochoth|shazhozhochoth]] || [[word:shazhozhochoj|shazhozhochoj]] || [[word:shazhozhochosh|shazhozhochosh]] || [[word:shazhozhocho|shazhozhocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shazhochoth|shazhochoth]] || [[word:shazhochoj|shazhochoj]] || [[word:shazhochosh|shazhochosh]] || [[word:shazhocho|shazhocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shazhofchoth|shazhofchoth]] || [[word:shazhofchoj|shazhofchoj]] || [[word:shazhofchosh|shazhofchosh]] || [[word:shazhofchof|shazhofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shazhochotho|shazhochotho]] || [[word:shazhochojo|shazhochojo]] || [[word:shazhochosho|shazhochosho]] || [[word:shazhochoko|shazhochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shazhochoth|shazhochoth]] || [[word:shazhochoj|shazhochoj]] || [[word:shazhochosh|shazhochosh]] || [[word:shazhocho|shazhocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shazhochothol|shazhochothol]] || [[word:shazhochojol|shazhochojol]] || [[word:shazhochoshol|shazhochoshol]] || [[word:shazhochokol|shazhochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shazhochothotho|shazhochothotho]] || [[word:shazhochojojo|shazhochojojo]] || [[word:shazhochoshosho|shazhochoshosho]] || [[word:shazhochoko|shazhochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shazhochothon|shazhochothon]] || [[word:shazhochojon|shazhochojon]] || [[word:shazhochoshon|shazhochoshon]] || [[word:shazhochokon|shazhochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shazhochothoro|shazhochothoro]] || [[word:shazhochojoro|shazhochojoro]] || [[word:shazhochoshoro|shazhochoshoro]] || [[word:shazhochokoro|shazhochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
